text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I stop by a cafe to take a<n>break, and
just when I take a seat...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there! Quick question. If you<n>were going
for a drive, would you<n>rather go to the beach or
visit a new<n>town?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there! Quick question. If you<n>were going
for a drive, would you<n>rather go to the beach or
visit a new<n>town?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We're all going for a drive soon, but<n>we can't
decide where to!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, putting on some classic tunes<n>and getting
real misty-eyed while<n>driving by the beach
sounds groovy<n>and all...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But the excitement of exploring a new<n>place is
also totally bodacious!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We could grab Italian food for lunch,<n>then boogie
on down to the disco at<n>night! I'm sure that'll
breathe some<n>fresh air into everyone!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hang on! I was supposed to be<n>getting your
input! My bad! That was<n>totes bogus of me! So
where should<n>we go?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My head is still reeling from the<n>barrage of dated
terms Maruzensky<n>keeps throwing at me, but I
do my<n>best to answer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The roads are wider out there, and it<n>feels
amazing cruising in my car at full<n>speed! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Right on! The beach it is! Thanks!<n>You're a
lifesaver! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Can't have a road trip without some<n>excitement!
We can cruise on some<n>new routes too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Booyah! I'm gonna give that shot!<n>Thanks for
helping me make up my<n>mind! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky chugs the nata de coco<n>drink on the
table and leaves, bidding<n>me farewell with a crisp
"Catch ya on<n>the flipside."
